lessons.title: Introduction to Microsoft Sentinel
lessons.content_md:
Get familiar with Microsoft Sentinel, a cloud-native, security information and event management (SIEM) service.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-sentinel/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.content_md:
Create and manage Microsoft Sentinel workspaces

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-manage-azure-sentinel-workspaces/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create and manage Microsoft Sentinel workspaces

lessons.title: Integrate Microsoft Defender XDR with Microsoft Sentinel
lessons.content_md:
In this module, you learn how to integrate Microsoft Defender XDR with Microsoft Sentinel.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/integrate-microsoft-defender-xdr-with-microsoft-sentinel/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Integrate Microsoft Defender XDR with Microsoft Sentinel

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Configure your Microsoft Sentinel environment
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Configure your Microsoft Sentinel environment**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
